title: viola × bessarabica
intro: Viola × bessarabica, also known as Bessarabian pansy or hybrid pansy, is a plant species in the violet family (Violaceae). The medicinal properties of Viola × bessarabica include its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Viola × bessarabica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
